description: Confounder: The model assumes that LayerNorm with elementwise_affine=False never contributes

_meta.explanation: The rule 'AdaLayerNormZero's norm layer has no learnable parameters because elementwise_affine=False, so its state_dict contains only the linear projection's weights and bias.' does NOT hold here. The model assumes that LayerNorm with elementwise_affine=False never contributes parameters to the state_dict. However, if eps is manually replaced with a Parameter, it becomes a learnable parameter and appears in the state_dict, even though it's unconventional.
_meta.curriculum_note: Rule 'AdaLayerNormZero's norm layer has no learnable parameters because elementwise_affine=False, so its state_dict contains only the linear projection's weights and bias.' holds in the obvious case but breaks here. Distractor B is the hard negative — the rule naively applied.
